rankings.title: When the Canal Runs Dry: Climate Shocks, Trade Costs, and Consumer Prices
conditions: defining Canal exposure entirely from pre-2023 routing
making import-price pass-through the core downstream outcome
with CPI as secondary

rankings.title: The Environmental Cost of Downstreaming: Smelter-Level Pollution from Indonesia's Nickel Export Ban
conditions: making the local spatial/wind design the causal core
securing a credible welfare outcome beyond pollution alone if possible

rankings.title: Do Export Controls Have Teeth? Product-Level Evidence from Russia Sanctions Enforcement
Friendly Fire: How US Section 301 Tariff Exclusions Picked Winners and Losers Among American Importers
Do Export Controls Have Teeth? Product-Level Evidence from Russia Sanctions Enforcement
conditions: verifying that transit countries did not simply stop reporting CHPL-specific trade data to UN Comtrade post-2023

rankings.title: The Environmental Cost of Downstreaming: Smelter-Level Pollution from Indonesia's Nickel Export Ban
conditions: securing high-quality
granular mortality/morbidity data before spending months on the PM2.5 spatial analysis

rankings.title: Friendly Fire: How US Section 301 Tariff Exclusions Picked Winners and Losers
conditions: proving that a sufficient sample of USTR exclusions map perfectly
exclusively to 10-digit HS codes without text-description overlap

rankings.title: When the Canal Runs Dry: Climate Shocks, Trade Costs, and Consumer Prices
When the Canal Runs Dry: Climate Shocks, Trade Costs, and Consumer Prices
conditions: building a strong pre-drought route-exposure measure
cleanly separating Panama effects from Red Sea/post-pandemic shocks
showing at least one convincing price pass-through result

rankings.title: Do Export Controls Have Teeth? Product-Level Evidence from Russia Sanctions Enforcement
conditions: obtaining monthly trade data or a cleaner post-enforcement window
showing CHPL products were not already reverting relative to controls
stress-testing mirror-data reliability across transit countries

rankings.title: The Environmental Cost of Downstreaming: Smelter-Level Pollution from Indonesia's Nickel Export Ban
conditions: obtaining credible health outcomes or a stronger welfare margin
demonstrating robust effects with wind-based exposure
convincingly addressing wildfire/haze confounding
endogenous siting
